title: Directory Creation and Removal Process Flow
description: A flowchart illustrating the sequence of operations and system interactions when using the mkdir() and rmdir() system calls in UNIX.
relationships: User Program calls mkdir() with path and mode
mkdir() validates parameters and invokes Kernel VFS
VFS checks permissions and calls appropriate Filesystem Driver
Filesystem Driver creates directory structure on disk
Success/failure status returned to User Program
User Program calls rmdir() with path
rmdir() checks if directory is empty and invokes Kernel VFS
VFS validates and calls Filesystem Driver to remove directory
Success/failure status returned to User Program
